zh.lifeSummary: 當Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy於大約1148年出生在比利時海瑙特庫勒斯時，他的父親Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies31歲，母親Gerberge De Landen35歲。他於1158年與Marguerite de Quiévrain結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1192年7月在以色列מחוז הצפון阿可享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy于大约1148年出生在比利时海瑙特庫勒斯时，他的父亲Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies31岁，母亲Gerberge De Landen35岁。他于1158年与Marguerite de Quiévrain结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1192年7月在以色列מחוז הצפון阿可享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Otton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy was born about 1148, in Courcelles, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies, was 31 and his mother, Gerberge De Landen, was 35. He married Marguerite de Quiévrain in 1158. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in July 1192, in Akko, Northern, Israel, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy est né environ 1148, à Courcelles, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gerberge De Landen, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Quiévrain en 1158. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en juillet 1192, à Akko, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy um 1148 in Courcelles, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies 31 und seine Mutter Gerberge De Landen 35. Er hat 1158 Marguerite de Quiévrain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Juli 1192 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Akko, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy è nato il circa 1148 nel Courcelles, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Gerberge De Landen, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Quiévrain nel 1158. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel luglio 1192, nel Akko, Northern, Israele, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquyが約1148年にベルギーヘイナトコウルセレスで生まれた時，父Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegniesは31歳，母Gerberge De Landenは35歳であった。1158年にMarguerite de Quiévrainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1192年7月にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןアクコで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy(이)가 대략 1148년 벨기에 하인오트 쿠르셀레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Gerberge De Landen(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1158년 Marguerite de Quiévrain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1192년 7월 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון 왁오에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Courcelles, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge De Landen, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Quiévrain em 1158. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em julho de 1192, em Akko, Northern, Israel, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy родился около 1148 г. в местности коурселлесь, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gerberge De Landen, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Quiévrain в 1158 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер июль 1192 г. в местности акко, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chevalier Otton II Trazegnies de Blicquy nació aproximadamente 1148, en Courcelles, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Chevalier Gilles I De Trazegnies, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gerberge De Landen, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Quiévrain en 1158. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en julio de 1192, en Akko, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 45 años.
